message:
feat(ui): expand analytics dashboard with additional chart types and improved app layout

- Add new analytics chart queries and visualization data pipelines for
  expanded dashboard coverage
- Expand app UI layer with additional dashboard views, improved panel
  layout, and richer navigation between analytics surfaces
- Wire expanded analytics data loading through the app state management
- Minor formatting cleanup: wrap long fingerprint truncation expressions
  across multiple lines in lib.rs and wizard.rs for readability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
